Nagomi
Home Shiro Pride Mental Health Anime

Welcome to Nagomi

A welcoming Discord community focused on pride, mental wellbeing, anime, friendship, and creating a safe space for everyone.

Our Community

We bring together people from all backgrounds to connect, support one another, discuss interests and build meaningful friendships.

Join Our Discord Server

Pride

Our goal is to create a place where YOU feel welcomed, included and safe!

Nagomi is an inclusitivity focussed community. With many server members being either apart of LGBTQIA+ or allies. We have a rich pride based community where all are welcome. Staff put time and effort into creating a safe place through moderation, communication and support for all members. Admins will always be there to listen to you and will often add new roles, channels or other features to the server when requested by members.

Mental Health

At Nagomi, we aim to create a welcoming and supportive space where everyone can feel comfortable being themselves. Whether you need a place to vent, share your experiences, or simply chat with people who understand, our community is here to listen and support one another with kindness and respect.

Anime

Here we love anime and often discuss or stream different shows. From discussing the latest seasonal releases to sharing favorite characters, recommendations and memes, there's always something to talk about. Whether you're a longtime fan or just getting started, you'll find plenty of people excited to chat about anime with you.

Find Out More

Shiro

Learn more about Shiro, our servers custom bot.

Pride

Mental Health

Anime
